1N4148W._dimension_evidence: Used page 3, the detailed 'Mechanical Dimensions SOD-123 (Millimeters/Inches)' drawing. In the main top view, the largest outer vertical body dimension is 3.86 mm max and the orthogonal outer horizontal dimension is 1.80 mm max. In the side view, the package height/thickness is 1.35 mm max from the bottom reference plane to the top. Pin count determined as 2 from the SOD-123 diode package drawing/marking diagram with two terminals.
1N4148W._electrical_evidence: Part number from header: 1N4148W. Operating temperature taken from Maximum Ratings 'Junction Temperature Range TJ -55 to +125 °C'. Current rating taken from 'Average Rectified Output Current IO 150 mA' (normalized to 0.15 A), preferring IO over IF 300 mA. VRRM from Maximum Ratings 'Peak Repetitive Reverse Voltage VRRM 75 V'. VF from Electrical Characteristics 'Forward Voltage VFM' maxima: 0.715 V @IF=1mA, 0.855 V @IF=10mA, 1.00 V @IF=50mA, 1.25 V @IF=150mA. IR from Electrical Characteristics 'Reverse Leakage Current IRM' maxima: 2.5 uA @VR=75V and 25 nA @VR=20V.

BAS16._dimension_evidence: Best page is page 5, Fig. 7 'Package outline SOT23'. In the main top view, the horizontal outer dimension is 2.8 to 3.0 mm, so max length = 3.0 mm. The vertical outer dimension is 2.1 to 2.5 mm, so max width = 2.5 mm. In the side view, the package thickness is 0.9 to 1.1 mm, so max height = 1.1 mm. Pin labels 1, 2, and 3 are shown on the outline, giving 3 pins.
BAS16._electrical_evidence: Part number from title/order info: BAS16. Temperature from Limiting values: ambient temperature Tamb -65 to 150 °C (used as operating-like range; Tj max 150 °C also listed). Forward current from Limiting values: IF forward current max 215 mA = 0.215 A. VRRM from Limiting values: repetitive peak reverse voltage 100 V. VF from Characteristics table: 715 mV @ IF=1 mA, 855 mV @10 mA, 1 V @50 mA, 1.25 V @150 mA. IR from Characteristics table: 30 nA @ VR=25 V, Tamb=25 °C; 0.5 µA @80 V, 25 °C; 30 µA @25 V, Tj=150 °C; 50 µA @80 V, Tj=150 °C.

BAS21H._dimension_evidence: Used page 4, the detailed mechanical case outline for SOD-323 (CASE 477). In the top view, D is the body length and E is the body width; from the millimeters table, D max = 1.80 mm and E max = 1.35 mm. The largest outer package dimension in the main top view is H, which spans the full package including leads, with H max = 2.70 mm, so length = 2.70 mm and width = 1.35 mm. Height was taken from end/side view dimension A with max = 1.00 mm. Pin count is 2, visible from terminal labels 1 and 2 in the outline/marking views.
BAS21H._electrical_evidence: Part number from title/header: BAS21H. Temperature from Thermal Characteristics: 'Junction and Storage Temperature Range TJ, Tstg −55 to +150 °C' used as operating-like range per instruction. I_F from Maximum Ratings: 'Peak Forward Current IF 200 mA' => 0.2 A. V_RRM from Maximum Ratings: 'Repetitive Peak Reverse Voltage VRRM 250 V'. V_F from Electrical Characteristics: 'Forward Voltage (IF=100 mAdc) max 1000 mV; (IF=200 mAdc) max 1250 mV' => 1 V @100 mA, 1.25 V @200 mA. I_R from Electrical Characteristics: 'Reverse Voltage Leakage Current (VR=200 Vdc) max 0.1 µAdc; (VR=200 Vdc, TJ=150°C) max 100 µAdc'.

BAT750._dimension_evidence: Used page 4, the detailed 'Package Outline Dimensions' for SOT23 (Standard). From the dimension table: D = 2.80/3.00/2.90 mm, E = 2.25/2.55/2.40 mm, A1 = 0.00/0.10/0.05 mm, A2 = 0.85/1.10/0.975 mm. Length taken as max D = 3.00 mm, width as max E = 2.55 mm, height as max package thickness A = A1 + A2 with max 0.10 + 1.10 = 1.20 mm but the table also shows overall A min/max/typ as 0.90/1.15/1.025 mm, so used the explicit overall max A = 1.15 mm? However the drawing/table indicates A is overall thickness and max is 1.15 mm. Pin count determined as 3 from the SOT23 package drawing/top view with three terminals visible.
BAT750._electrical_evidence: Part number from title. Maximum Ratings table lists Peak Repetitive Reverse Voltage VRRM = 40 V and Average Rectified Current IO = 0.75 A. Thermal Characteristics lists Operating and Storage Temperature Range TJ, TSTG = -55 to +125 °C, used as operating-like range per instruction. Electrical Characteristics table lists maximum Forward Voltage VF values of 235/290/340/390/420/475/650 mV at IF = 50/100/250/500/750/1000/1500 mA, normalized to volts. Reverse Current IR table gives typ 50 µA and max 100 µA at VR = 30 V; extracted max value as requested.

BAV99W._dimension_evidence: Used page 5, the detailed 'Package Dimensions' drawing for JEDEC SOT-323 / nickname USM. In the main front view, the horizontal body dimension is marked '2 ±0.2', giving max length 2.2 mm. The vertical outer dimension in that same main view is marked '2.1 ±0.1', giving max width 2.2 mm. In the side/bottom view, the overall thickness is marked '0.9 ±0.1', giving max height 1.0 mm. Pin count is 3, visible from terminal labels 1, 2, and 3 in the package drawing.
BAV99W._electrical_evidence: Part number from title/header: BAV99W. Temperature from Absolute Maximum Ratings: Junction temperature Tj = 150°C and storage temperature Tstg = -55 to 150°C; per instruction using operating-like range when only available, min/max taken as -55 to 150°C. Current rating from Absolute Maximum Ratings: Average rectified current IO = 150 mA = 0.15 A. Reverse voltage from Absolute Maximum Ratings: Peak reverse voltage VRM = 100 V (used for VRRM). Forward voltage maxima from Electrical Characteristics: VF(1)=0.715 V at IF=1 mA, VF(2)=0.855 V at 10 mA, VF(3)=1.00 V at 50 mA, VF(4)=1.25 V at 150 mA. Reverse current maxima from Electrical Characteristics: IR(1)=30 nA at VR=25 V, IR(2)=200 nA at VR=80 V.

CD4148WTP._dimension_evidence: Page 1 contains the package outline drawing and dimensions table for size 0603. The table lists L = 1.55±0.1 mm, W = 0.80±0.1 mm, T = 0.65±0.1 mm, C = 0.35±0.1 mm. Using the maximum outer package values from the main package view gives length L max = 1.65 mm, width W max = 0.90 mm, and height/thickness T max = 0.75 mm. The outline drawing shows a two-terminal diode package, so pin count is 2.
CD4148WTP._electrical_evidence: Part number from title/header. Temperature from THERMAL CHARACTERISTICS: 'Operating& Storage Temperature range -55 to 150 oC' (used per instruction when operating-like range is the available one). I_O/I_F from MAXIMUM RATING: 'Average rectified current ... IF(AV) 100 mA' => 0.1 A. V_RRM from MAXIMUM RATING: 'Repetitive Peak Reverse Voltage VRRM 75 V'. V_F from ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS: 'Forward Voltage at IF=10mA 1.0 MAX V' and 'at IF=100mA VF 1.25 MAX V'. I_R from ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS: 'Leakage Current at VR=20V 0.025 MAX uA' and 'Leakage Current at VR=75V IR 5 MAX uA'.

DFLS160._dimension_evidence: Used page 4, the detailed 'Package Outline Dimensions' for PowerDI123. In the dimension table, E has Max = 3.90 mm (largest horizontal outer dimension in bottom view, used as length), D has Max = 1.78 mm (orthogonal outer body dimension in top view, used as width), and A has Max = 1.00 mm (overall height from seating plane). Pin count determined as 2 from the package drawings showing two terminals/leads (one on each side).
DFLS160._electrical_evidence: Part number from title. Maximum Ratings table lists Peak Repetitive Reverse Voltage VRRM = 60V and Average Forward Current IF(AV) = 1.0A. Thermal Characteristics lists Operating and Storage Temperature Range TJ, TSTG = -65 to +150°C. Electrical Characteristics lists Forward Voltage VF max 0.50V at IF = 1.0A and Leakage Current IR max 0.1mA at VR = 60V, TA = +25°C.

MBR15U150._dimension_evidence: Page 1 contains the detailed TO-277 package outline and dimension table. Using the package body/envelope maxima from the MM MAX column: C = 6.60 mm and D = 5.50 mm from the main top-view outline, and H = 1.20 mm from the side-view thickness. Internal structure / package drawing shows pins 1, 2, and 3, so pin count is 3.
MBR15U150._electrical_evidence: Part number from header/table: MBR15U150. Operating Junction Temperature Range listed as -55°C to +150°C. Average Forward Current IF(AV) = 15A at TC=60°C. Maximum Recurrent Peak Reverse Voltage / DC Blocking Voltage table gives 150V. Electrical Characteristics table lists Forward Voltage VF max 0.84V at IF=15A, TJ=25°C and 0.739V max at IF=15A, TJ=125°C. Reverse Current IR max listed as 10uA at VR=150V, TJ=25°C and 2mA at VR=150V, TJ=125°C.

MSB30M._dimension_evidence: Page 4 shows the detailed 'Package Outline Dimensions' for package MSBL. In the top view, D is the horizontal outer body dimension and E1 is the larger vertical outer body dimension; from the table, D max = 6.60 mm and E1 max = 7.30 mm. Using the larger main-view dimension as length and the orthogonal one as width gives length = 7.30 mm and width = 6.60 mm. In the side view, A is the overall height from seating plane to top, with A max = 1.50 mm. The drawings show four terminals/pads, so pin count = 4.
MSB30M._electrical_evidence: Part number from header: MSB30M. Maximum Ratings lists Peak Repetitive Reverse Voltage VRRM = 1000V and Average Rectified Output Current IO = 3.0A (@TC=+120°C). Thermal Characteristics gives Operating and Storage Temperature Range TJ, TSTG = -55 to +150°C. Electrical Characteristics table provides maximum VF points per element: 0.80V @ IF=1.5A, TA=+25°C; 0.88V @ IF=1.5A, TA=+125°C; 1.02V @ IF=3.0A, TA=+25°C; 1.1V @ IF=3.0A, TA=+125°C. Leakage Current IR max values: 5μA @ VR=1000V, TA=+25°C and 500μA @ VR=1000V, TA=+125°C.

SBR05U20LPS._dimension_evidence: Used page 4, the detailed 'Package Outline Dimensions' drawing/table for package X2-DFN1006-2. In the table, D = 0.95/1.075/1.00 mm (Min/Max/Typ) and E = 0.55/0.675/0.60 mm; from the main top view these are the outer body length and width, so max length = 1.075 mm and max width = 0.675 mm. Height from the side view uses A = 0.34/0.40/0.37 mm, so max height = 0.40 mm. Pin count is 2 from package name 'X2-DFN1006-2' and the drawing note 'Pin #1 ID' with two terminal pads shown.
SBR05U20LPS._electrical_evidence: Part number from datasheet title. VRRM=20V and IO=500mA from Maximum Ratings table. Operating temperature taken from 'Operating and Storage Temperature Range TJ, TSTG -65 to +150°C'. VF max points and IR max points taken from Electrical Characteristics table with listed IF/VR and junction temperature conditions.
